instruction: Open Reminders and add a new reminder titled {TARGET} to the Reminders list. Do not modify any existing reminder.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity); AndroidWorld validate_rows_addition_integrity ported to Reminders — clearing the list then adding only the target scores 0

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to tell list "Reminders" to delete every reminder' 2>/dev/null || true; for n in "Pay rent" "Call Mom"; do osascript -e "tell application \"Reminders\" to tell list \"Reminders\" to make new reminder with properties {name:\"$n\"}" 2>/dev/null || true; done; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench"; osascript -e 'set t to name of every reminder of list "Reminders" of application "Reminders"' -e 'set AppleScript'\''s text item delimiters to linefeed' -e 'return (t as text)' 2>/dev/null > "$HOME/.guibench/reminders.before"
osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to tell list "Reminders" to make new reminder with properties {name:"{TARGET}"}' 2>/dev/null || true
